text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... What's this feeling?! It's like I'm a
dandelion seed floating on the wind!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Goddesses! Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now that I know you're rooting for me, I promise I
won't let you down!
